visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a transparent yellow jacket over a light-colored top with a red lanyard, stands in a brightly lit retail environment. She holds a circular, multi-colored diatomaceous earth coaster up towards the camera. The background is a busy shopping mall with white shelving, various retail products in plastic packaging, and several blurred people moving about. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a large commercial space. (2) A series of close-up shots showcase different coaster designs featuring cute cartoon characters and bubble tea patterns. The woman's hands with white nail polish are seen holding and rotating these coasters against a background of shelves. Large yellow and white text overlays appear on the left side of the screen. (3) The scene shifts as the woman holds a patterned card holder with a bright red lanyard. She points to it while looking directly at the camera, her expression cheerful and engaging. In the background, more packaged merchandise hangs on metal racks. (4) The camera pans across a display of colorful iPhone cases in blue, red, and patterned boxes. The woman stands by the shelf, gesturing with both hands towards the variety of cases available. The mall interior remains visible in the background with multiple shoppers walking past. (5) The woman is now positioned next to a large stack of orange and cream-colored boxes featuring cartoon mushroom illustrations. She holds a small plastic sample cup with a logo on it, smiling brightly and speaking enthusiastically. She then picks up a larger pouch of mushroom chicken soup to show its packaging details to the viewers.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 官網沒有的. [Slogan]: 新竹巨城. [Variety]: 快閃活動. (2) [Slogan]: 3/17-3/31. [Logo]: HAHABABY. (3) [Slogan]: 硅藻土杯墊. [Subtitle]: 硅藻土杯墊. (4) [Subtitle]: 你在官網上是買不到的. [Subtitle]: 現場這趟都有. (5) [Slogan]: 滑蓋硬殼卡套. [Subtitle]: 識別證、卡片. [Subtitle]: 帶了一些品項來. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個我們那時候去日本. [Subtitle]: 也是賣得蠻好的一個品項. (7) [Slogan]: 手機殼. [Subtitle]: iPhone14-iPhone16. (8) [Subtitle]: 從iPhone14開始到16. [Subtitle]: 都有. [Subtitle]: 那你們可以來選看看. (9) [Subtitle]: 有沒有自己喜歡的. [Subtitle]: 然後現場也有可以試用看看. (10) [Slogan]: 香菇雞湯. [Subtitle]: 雞湯麵搶先賣. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是廠商先交了一點貨. [Subtitle]: 我們直接送過來巨城現場. (12) [Subtitle]: 大家可以直接買得到. [Subtitle]: 這樣一包. (13) [Subtitle]: 現場我們有提供試吃. [Subtitle]: 喜歡的話就可以整盒這樣帶走. (14) [Subtitle]: 熱騰騰的. [Subtitle]: 然後官網的話是3月28上架.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female presenter, 2 staff members behind the counter, and roughly 5 customers/passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long, straight dark hair, wearing a light-colored top, a blue and red vest, and a transparent yellow outer layer. She wears a red lanyard around her neck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bustling indoor shopping mall environment with white product shelves, metal clothing racks, a cashier counter, and various shoppers in the background. Colorful banners and signage are also visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice starts speaking immediately, introducing a pop-up store event. The background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a fast BPM and a strong, driving beat. A soft 'whoosh' SFX marks the first transition. (2) The speaker continues with high energy and rapid speech, detailing the exclusivity of the coasters. The BGM remains steady, and faint ambient mall chatter can be heard below the primary signal. A subtle 'pop' sound effect emphasizes a product reveal. (3) As the speaker transitions to card holders, her pitch variability remains high, conveying excitement. The BGM maintain its percussive texture. Another 'whoosh' transition SFX triggers a visual shift. (4) The female narration flows into a description of phone cases, maintaining a consistent high arousal and positive valence. The BGM's synth melody provides a bright, sharp backdrop. Minor incidental noises from handling packaging are audible. (5) The speaker introduces the chicken soup with increased enthusiasm. A final 'whoosh' SFX occurs as the sample cup is shown. The BGM continues its steady loop until the track fades out at the very end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Event Intro -> Exclusive Item 1 -> Exclusive Item 2 -> Category 3 -> New Product Launch -> CTA/Availability
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the HAHABABY pop-up store event at Hsinchu Big City, highlighting exclusive in-person products and early access items to drive physical foot traffic and sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The presenter is clearly identifying and promoting specific brand products within a branded retail environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy promotional short-form video utilizing fast-paced editing and variety-show style text overlays typical of social media marketing.
